CREATE TABLE t (a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
SELECT array_concat_agg(a) AS a FROM t;
CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int32, array_col Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT array_concat_agg(array_col) AS concatenated_arrays FROM t1;
CREATE TABLE t2 (id Int32, a Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT array_concat_agg(t1.array_col) AS aggregated_array FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.id = t2.id WHERE t2.a > 10;
SELECT array_concat_agg(a) AS a FROM (SELECT a FROM t) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE t3 (id Int32, value Array(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT array_concat_agg(value) AS all_values FROM (SELECT value FROM t3) AS v;
SELECT array_concat_agg(t3.value) AS all_values FROM t3 JOIN t2 ON t2.id = t3.id WHERE array_length(t3.value) > 1;
SELECT array_concat_agg(array_concat_agg(a)) AS nested_concatenation FROM (SELECT array_concat_agg(a) AS a FROM t) AS inner_query;
